paper_context:
TITLE: Your Paper Title Here

ABSTRACT:
Paste your full abstract here. The LLM evaluator uses this to judge relevance.

KEY CONTRIBUTIONS:
1. First contribution
2. Second contribution

METHODS USED: List key methods, models, datasets

PAPER SECTIONS:
- Introduction
- Related Work
- Method
- Experiments
- Conclusions
paper_abstract: Paste a shorter version of your abstract here. Used for Scholar Inbox semantic search.
scholar_inbox_queries: Paste queries that describe your paper's core idea from different angles.
Each query should be 1-2 sentences, like an abstract snippet.
More queries = broader coverage but slower search.
semantic_scholar_queries: combine key terms from your method
arxiv_queries: all:"your keyword" AND all:"another keyword" AND cat:cs.CV
